name: ecommerce-vibe-pulse
description: VibePulse — Ecommerce Sprint 2: Página Principal y Catálogo

scripts.install:all: pnpm install && cd client && pnpm install && cd ../server && pnpm install
scripts.build: cd client && pnpm run build && cd ../server && pnpm run build
scripts.prisma:migrate: cd server && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.prisma:seed: cd server && npx prisma db seed
